issues.description: Condition checks 'HasCardOnBoard' for Blackbeard Pirates type, but card text says 'If your Leader has the {Blackbeard Pirates} type'. Should use 'LeaderHasType' condition instead.

Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is incomplete. Must specify 'maxCost:1' constraint, but also needs clarity on selection semantics. Should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with explicit cost constraint in target definition.
